summary: SINGLE_FOCUS: projectile from launcher to hoop (d=5m, h=1m). ValueTracker θ_tr sweeps launch angle; for each angle compute required speed v² = gd²/(2cos²θ(d tan θ - h)); always_redraw YELLOW trajectory arc + RED midpoint ball. RIGHT axes show v(θ) curve with BLUE line + YELLOW rider dot; live panel has θ, v.
